title: albizia balansae
intro: Albizia balansae, also known as the Balansa tree or Balansa mimosa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Albizia balansae can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, or used in traditional medicine in the form of tinctures or powdered extracts.
